title: Seele 3I Possible
wikitext:
[]: Seele 3I Possible?             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Mar 03, 2008 9:27 pm Split from "Angel Souls" Thread. Sachiel_13 wrote: Reichu wrote: SEELE used Unit-01 was their medium for 3I. Gendo used Adam and Lilith. Would Unit-01 have worked by itself? Split perhaps, or shall Reichu just tell me right here and now?

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Mar 03, 2008 9:35 pm Well, I think that if I understand things correctly, if the Fruits of Knowledge and Life combined, that would cause Third Impact. Adam and Lillith were the source or bearers of these fruits, so that the unification of them would cause Third Impact. Unit-01 was in possession of both of these fruits, the fruit of Knowledge by being a clone of Lillith, or even more, carrying a child of Lillith with her (Shinji or Yui). It would have also had the Fruit of Life by containing the S2 organ it took from Zeruel. Then the harpies come in and force Unit-01 to do something involving uniting the two, but I'm not exactly sure what. But I think from my understanding of the situation, SEELE could have started Third Impact with Unit-01, but Gendo beat them to it by uniting Adam and Lillith.

[]:             Quote Post by TemporalKnight » Mon Mar 03, 2008 9:40 pm I personally find it rather dubious. Obviously SEELE believed it and I'm sure they researched it quite carefully but it still seems like a long shot. Yes Unit 01 may have had both the FoL and the FoK but is that really enough. It just seems to me that the Seeds would have been special. While Unit 01 may have been made from Lilith that doesn't mean that it is a Seed itself. I highly doubt that their replica Lance's would have been strong enough to do the trick but I suppose it is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Mar 03, 2008 9:41 pm Lilith/Adam > Unit-01 A clone can never truly take the place of the original.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 03, 2008 9:50 pm They seemed plenty content with what led up to, and after the Rei hijack: EoE wrote: SEELE 01: Our servants, the Eva series... (Keel appears) Their existence has all been for this one moment. ... SEELE 08/09: With the Purification of the Red Earth... That bespeaks time eternal... SEELE 11: First, return the Geofront... Keel: To its true form. (Pull-back shot of the Earth and Lilith's Egg) ... All (chanting): Evangelion Unit 01's pilot... Complement humankind with your imperfect ego. Keel: The moment of the Third Retribution has come. (Eva series form into pattern) ... SEELE 01: The beginning and the end are as one. Good... Everything is as it should be... (Keel appears... and then dissolves into LCL, leaving behind the mechanical remains of his lower body)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Mar 03, 2008 10:00 pm Keel probably thought that even with Lilth/Adam, Shinji would've chosen Instrumentality. So it mean no harm to his plan.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy » Mon Mar 03, 2008 10:38 pm One of the things I never got was why were Seele so pissed after Eva 1 ate the S2 engine? Were they planning to put there own engines in Eva 1?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Mar 06, 2008 2:45 am Copy/Past what I said in the last thread: Gendo needed Adam's soul - the soul left behind after Kaworu died - to fuse with the embryo in his hand. No soul, no "forbidden union". 3rd Impact: Using an S2 and a massive Anti AT Field to wipe out AT Fields on Earth (thus, releasing souls from their vessels). Instrumentality: 3rd Impact + Lilith or a suitable substitute (Shogouki) to absorb/collect/gather (whatever the correct term is) the souls into Lilith's Egg/Black Moon where they all become a single, collective, "perfect" being. For the former, they needed an S2 or multiple S2s (in the case of the MPEs) in order to execute such a plan. For the latter they needed, well, just what I said. There are some bits that aren't clear as to exactly how this works, but that's the gist of it. Guy wrote: One of the things I never got was why were Seele so pissed after Eva 1 ate the S2 engine? Were they planning to put there own engines in Eva 1?
